name: Milt Raskin
abstract: Milt Raskin (January 27, 1916 – October 16, 1977) was an American swing jazz pianist.

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Rowles
about_quotes.evidence: She had guys like Milt Raskin, or Milt...the guy that bought RKO, Milt Raxson(?) or whatever his name is... Kind of like that.
